title: crassula orbicularis
intro: Crassula orbicularis, also known as the Jade Plant or Money Plant, is a succulent plant species that belongs to the family Crassulaceae. Traditionally, the plant's leaves and stems are used in herbal medicine, where they are valued for their anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and protect against infections. The health benefits of consuming Crassula orbicularis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting liver function, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems are often dried, crushed, or infused in tea to harness their medicinal properties, and are sometimes used in traditional remedies for various ailments.
